description_long: This house features a modern, L-shaped layout with a flat roof and a predominantly white and gray exterior. Large rectangular windows are arranged in symmetrical rows along the facade, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The main entryway is centrally located, marked by a prominent door and a paved approach, with no visible porch or overhang. The structure appears to be a single-story building with spacious, open-plan rooms and some interior partitions visible through the windows. The exterior walls are finished in a smooth, likely concrete or stucco material, complemented by glass and metal window frames. The overall design is clean and functional, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on geometric simplicity.
description: A modern, single-story L-shaped house with a flat roof, large symmetrical windows, and a smooth white and gray exterior. The main entryway is centrally located with a paved approach and minimal decorative features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, symmetrical window rows, and the L-shaped layout with a paved approach.
description_view_1: Side angle revealing the depth of the L-shape, additional windows, and the continuation of the flat roof.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the long stretch of windows and the uninterrupted flat roofline.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the back and side walls, with more windows and the overall geometric simplicity.
attribute_entryway_design: Central main door with a paved approach, no porch or overhang, minimal decorative elements
